nasb.text: A man there said, “Now, who is their father?” Therefore it became a proverb: “Is Saul also among the prophets?”

esv.text: And a man of the place answered, “And who is their father?” Therefore it became a proverb, “Is Saul also among the prophets?”

cnv.text: 那裡有一個人回答：“這些人的父親是誰呢？”因此，後來有句俗語說：“掃羅也列在先知中間嗎？”

ccb.text: 当地的一个人说：“他们的父亲是谁？”自此以后，“扫罗也做了先知吗”就成为一句谚语。
